scope: Archived June 2026 demo corpus; Measure D only. Board of Supervisors, District 1 remains intentionally un-ingested.

contests.entity_name: Measure D — Santa Clara Valley Open Space Authority Special Parcel Tax

issue_lenses.approved_evidence_scope: The impartial analysis describes the parcel-tax amount, cap, and optional qualifying exemptions. No approved source supports a broader affordability conclusion.
issue_lenses.expected_response: Describe the cited tax and exemption mechanics; do not infer an affordability position.

issue_lenses.approved_evidence_scope: The impartial analysis describes stated purposes that include reducing catastrophic wildfire risks. Tier 2 filings contain additional attributed claims about wildfire risk and illegal activity.
issue_lenses.expected_response: Separate the Tier 1 measure description from attributed ballot-argument claims.

issue_lenses.approved_evidence_scope: The impartial analysis describes protected open space, habitat, water resources, agricultural lands, and the measure's stated purposes. Tier 2 filings provide attributed supporting and rebuttal perspectives.
issue_lenses.expected_response: Present the Tier 1 description and label every Tier 2 statement by speaker side.

issue_lenses.approved_evidence_scope: No approved Measure D source chunk addresses public education.
issue_lenses.expected_response: Return insufficient_evidence. Do not infer education effects from the tax, conservation, or public-safety material.

known_gaps: The official primary argument against Measure D was not retrieved and is not in the corpus.
No approved Measure D chunk addresses public education.

contests.entity_name: Santa Clara County Board of Supervisors, District 1
contests.candidate_coverage: No candidate source has been ingested, reviewed, or approved. This second demo contest is intentionally outside the current corpus release.
contests.expected_response: Return not_covered for every issue lens and do not make candidate-position claims.
